messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document.
Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Section metadata:
{
  "node_id": "0101",
  "title": "D1与D7留存率：竞争水平",
  "page_index": 52,
  "page_range": "52"
}

Section text:
D1与D7留存率：竞争水平
•这是用户获取（ UA）的最低可行阈值。在此水平下，若长期用户生命周期价值（ LTV）强劲，游戏即可实现盈
亏平衡。绝大多数中端 4X策略游戏均处于此区间。
•在此阈值下，社交生态运转良好，公会战等社群活动具备充足的玩家参与度。
•若你的游戏为纯经典 SLG，且D1留存率仅为 25%–30%，你将输掉“用户竞价战”，因为竞争对手拥有更宽广、更
高效的用户漏斗。
•联盟加入率 :Funtap  Games 的深度报告显示， 4X游戏的 D7留存率几乎完全取决于联盟加入率。
•玩家在 D3前加入联盟的比例必须超过 60%，方能构建健康的生态体系。
•那些加入联盟并参与“协助”互动（缩短建造时间）或参与“集结”活动（ Boss突袭）的玩家，其 D7留存率是单人
玩家的 3至4倍。游戏品类D1留存率
（Android ）D1留存率
（iOS）
行业中位数 20%-25% 25%-28%
竞争力水平 30%-35% 35%-40%
市场领导者 40%-45% 45%-55%
游戏品类 D7留存率
行业中位数 10%-15%
竞争力水平 15%-18%
市场领导者 18%-25%(或更高 )

message.content:
This section provides retrieval-ready benchmarks and strategic insights regarding Day 1 (D1) and Day 7 (D7) retention for mobile 4X and classic SLG games. It answers questions about:
• **Metrics & Tables:** What are the exact D1 (split by Android/iOS) and D7 retention percentage ranges for industry median, competitive, and market leader tiers?
• **UA & Profitability Thresholds:** What D1/D7 retention levels constitute the minimum viable threshold for user acquisition break-even when paired with strong long-term LTV?
• **Social Mechanics & Retention Claims:** How do alliance join rates and social interactions impact D7 retention? (Claims D7 retention depends almost entirely on alliance joins; >60% of players must join by D3 for ecosystem health; players participating in "assist" or "rally" activities show 3–4x higher D7 retention than solo players)
• **Competitive Positioning:** At what D1 retention range (25%–30%) will a classic SLG lose UA bidding wars due to less efficient user funnels?
• **Entities & Evidence Types:** Covers 4X strategy games, classic SLG, Android, iOS, and Funtap Games. Evidence includes industry benchmark tables, comparative retention multipliers, and funnel efficiency claims.
• **Procedures/Actions:** Identifies critical player onboarding milestones (pre-D3 alliance joining, participation in social features) required to sustain guild wars and community engagement.
• **Dates/Timeframes:** N/A (references D1, D3, D7 as retention measurement windows, not calendar dates).
message.reasoning_content:
Here's a thinking process:

1.  **Analyze User Input:**
   - **Task:** Create a retrieval-oriented summary for a document section.
   - **Focus:** What questions this section can answer (topics, entities, dates, definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, evidence types).
   - **Constraint:** Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.
   - **Input Metadata:** node_id: "0101", title: "D1与D7留存率：竞争水平", page_index: 52, page_range: "52"
   - **Input Text:** (Chinese text about D1 and D7 retention rates, competition levels, UA thresholds, LTV, 4X strategy games, SLG, alliance join rates, Funtap Games report, specific metrics for Android/iOS D1/D7 retention, industry median, competitive level, market leader benchmarks, etc.)

2.  **Deconstruct the Input Text (Mental Translation & Extraction):**
   - *Title:* D1与D7留存率：竞争水平 (D1 & D7 Retention Rates: Competition Level)
   - *Bullet 1:* This is the minimum viable threshold for User Acquisition (UA). At this level, if long-term LTV is strong, the game can break even. Most mid-tier 4X strategy games fall in this range.
   - *Bullet 2:* At this threshold, the social ecosystem functions well, with sufficient player participation in community activities like guild wars.
   - *Bullet 3:* If your game is a pure classic SLG and D1 retention is only 25%-30%, you will lose the "user bidding war" because competitors have wider, more efficient user funnels.
   - *Bullet 4:* Alliance Join Rate: Funtap Games in-depth report shows D7 retention for 4X games depends almost entirely on alliance join rate.
   - *Bullet 5:* The proportion of players joining an alliance before D3 must exceed 60% to build a healthy ecosystem.
   - *Bullet 6:* Players who join alliances and participate in "assist" interactions (shortening build times) or "rally" activities (Boss raids) have a D7 retention rate 3-4 times higher than solo players.
   - *Table 1:* Game Genre D1 Retention Rate (Android) / (iOS)
     - Industry Median: 20%-25% / 25%-28%
     - Competitive Level: 30%-35% / 35%-40%
     - Market Leader: 40%-45% / 45%-55%
   - *Table 2:* Game Genre D7 Retention Rate
     - Industry Median: 10%-15%
     - Competitive Level: 15%-18%
     - Market Leader: 18%-25% (or higher)

3.  **Identify Key Retrieval Dimensions (as requested):**
   - *Topics:* D1/D7 retention rates, competition levels, user acquisition (UA) thresholds, 4X strategy games, classic SLG, alliance join rates, social ecosystem/guild activities, LTV, user bidding war.
   - *Entities:* Funtap Games, 4X strategy games, classic SLG, Android, iOS.
   - *Dates:* None explicitly mentioned (D1, D3, D7 are timeframes/metrics, not calendar dates).
   - *Definitions/Concepts:* Minimum viable UA threshold, competitive retention levels, healthy ecosystem threshold (>60% alliance join by D3).
   - *Procedures/Actions:* Joining alliances before D3, participating in "assist" or "rally" activities.
   - *Claims:* D7 retention depends almost entirely on alliance join rate; 25-30% D1 for classic SLG leads to losing UA bidding wars; alliance participants have 3-4x higher D7 retention than solo players.
   - *Tables/Figures:* Two benchmark tables for D1 (Android/iOS) and D7 retention rates across Industry Median, Competitive Level, and Market Leader.
   - *Metrics:* D1 retention ranges (20-55%), D7 retention ranges (10-25%+), >60% alliance join rate by D3, 3-4x retention multiplier for social players.
   - *Evidence Types:* Industry benchmarks, Funtap Games deep-dive report data, comparative retention multipliers.

4.  **Draft the Summary (Retrieval-Oriented, focusing on Q&A potential):**
   This section provides benchmarks and strategic insights regarding Day 1 (D1) and Day 7 (D7) retention rates for mobile strategy games, specifically 4X and classic SLG titles. It answers questions about:

   - **UA & Monetization Thresholds:** What D1/D7 retention levels constitute the minimum viable threshold for user acquisition profitability and break-even LTV?
   - **Social Mechanics & Retention:** How do alliance join rates and social interactions (assists, rallies) impact D7 retention? (Cites Funtap Games report: D7 retention depends heavily on alliance joins; >60% must join by D3; social players retain 3–4x better than solo players)
   - **Competitive Positioning:** What D1 retention range (25%–30%) indicates a classic SLG will lose user acquisition bidding wars due to inefficient funnels?
   - **Ecosystem Health:** What metrics define a healthy social ecosystem and sufficient participation for guild wars?
   The section contains two comparative tables detailing D1 (split by Android/iOS) and D7 retention benchmarks across industry median, competitive, and market leader tiers, supported by evidence from industry reports and funnel efficiency claims.

   - *Retrieval-oriented?* Yes, structured to highlight what questions it answers.

   • **Social Impact on Retention:** How do alliance join rates and in-game social interactions affect D7 retention? (Claims D7 retention depends almost entirely on alliance joins; >60% of players must join by D3; participants in assists/rallies show 3–4x higher D7 retention than solo players)

response_text:
This section provides retrieval-ready benchmarks and strategic insights regarding Day 1 (D1) and Day 7 (D7) retention for mobile 4X and classic SLG games. It answers questions about:
• **Metrics & Tables:** What are the exact D1 (split by Android/iOS) and D7 retention percentage ranges for industry median, competitive, and market leader tiers?
• **UA & Profitability Thresholds:** What D1/D7 retention levels constitute the minimum viable threshold for user acquisition break-even when paired with strong long-term LTV?
• **Social Mechanics & Retention Claims:** How do alliance join rates and social interactions impact D7 retention? (Claims D7 retention depends almost entirely on alliance joins; >60% of players must join by D3 for ecosystem health; players participating in "assist" or "rally" activities show 3–4x higher D7 retention than solo players)
• **Competitive Positioning:** At what D1 retention range (25%–30%) will a classic SLG lose UA bidding wars due to less efficient user funnels?
• **Entities & Evidence Types:** Covers 4X strategy games, classic SLG, Android, iOS, and Funtap Games. Evidence includes industry benchmark tables, comparative retention multipliers, and funnel efficiency claims.
• **Procedures/Actions:** Identifies critical player onboarding milestones (pre-D3 alliance joining, participation in social features) required to sustain guild wars and community engagement.
• **Dates/Timeframes:** N/A (references D1, D3, D7 as retention measurement windows, not calendar dates).
